evidence_summary: Execute a high-impact physical feat to pivot the narrative from pursuit to observation. The sequence must emphasize the protagonist's superhuman agility through scale and trajectory, establishing his new status as a biological anomaly rather than mere prey.

To escape, the protagonist performs a massive thirty-foot leap, landing on the far side of the enclosure. The Martians witness this feat, shifting their view of him from prey to a "wonderful discovery."
